name: nestjs-dj-admin
description: NestJS-native admin framework inspired by Django admin

scripts.clean: npm run clean:shadow && rm -rf dist examples/typeorm-demo-app/dist examples/in-memory-demo-app/dist examples/prisma-demo-app/dist
scripts.dev:typeorm-example: npm run clean:shadow && nodemon --watch src --watch examples/shared/src --watch examples/typeorm-demo-app/src --ext ts --exec "TS_NODE_TRANSPILE_ONLY=true node --loader ts-node/esm examples/typeorm-demo-app/src/main.ts"
scripts.dev:inmemory-example: npm run clean:shadow && nodemon --watch src --watch examples/shared/src --watch examples/in-memory-demo-app/src --ext ts --exec "TS_NODE_TRANSPILE_ONLY=true node --loader ts-node/esm examples/in-memory-demo-app/src/main.ts"
scripts.dev:prisma-example: npm run prisma:generate:example && npm run clean:shadow && nodemon --watch src --watch examples/shared/src --watch examples/prisma-demo-app/src --watch examples/prisma-demo-app/prisma --ext ts,prisma --exec "TS_NODE_TRANSPILE_ONLY=true node --loader ts-node/esm examples/prisma-demo-app/src/main.ts"
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:lib && npm run build:ui
scripts.build:typeorm-example: npm run clean && npm run build:lib && tsc -p examples/typeorm-demo-app/tsconfig.json
scripts.build:inmemory-example: npm run clean && npm run build:lib && tsc -p examples/in-memory-demo-app/tsconfig.json
scripts.build:prisma-example: npm run prisma:generate:example && npm run clean && npm run build:lib && tsc -p examples/prisma-demo-app/tsconfig.json
scripts.build:examples: npm run prisma:generate:example && npm run clean && npm run build:lib && tsc -p examples/typeorm-demo-app/tsconfig.json && tsc -p examples/in-memory-demo-app/tsconfig.json && tsc -p examples/prisma-demo-app/tsconfig.json
scripts.prisma:setup:example: npm run prisma:generate:example && npm run prisma:push:example
